State.Author: lautasantenni and MrShadowBlood
State.Description:
Cleaned textures of Aetherium Armor and Weapons Compilation with optional files for better quality. Properly cleaned textures lets Skyrim use less memory loading it so means more FPS for you!



One of many mod textures I cleaned.



Comes with normal cleaned, 2x, and 4x though its recommend to use 2x or normal instead of 4x
